focus: Implementability — effort + risk per P0/P1 artifact

failure_mode: Pre-tool-call hook integration point breaks on cli-opencode version change
recommendation: Needs spike packet first. Create minimal hook integration proof-of-concept before full implementation.

failure_mode: Schema validation too permissive, allows invalid permission strings
recommendation: Implement comprehensive schema test suite before schema deployment. Include adversarial test cases for permission string bypasses.

failure_mode: Formula adaptation incorrect for research output context
recommendation: Needs spike packet first. Validate formula adaptation against sample research outputs before integration.

failure_mode: Integration handshake breaks dispatcher error handling
recommendation: Needs spike packet first. Test integration handshake in isolated environment before deep-loop deployment.

failure_mode: 8-model profile data drifts from actual model specs
recommendation: Implement automated validation of 8-model profile data against model provider APIs. Schedule regular profile updates.
